race.comment: SUN GOD (2) stoked up late but just failed to pick up the in-form WAR ETERNAL in the 1500m Spear Chief here recently. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and his mile form is very good. Big chance with Nash taking over. WAR ETERNAL (1) chalked up the hat trick of stakes wins last time, beating a few of today's key rivals. Races handy and makes his own luck. Maybe 60.5kgs will stop him. PASIMA (10) opened this prep with a couple of eye-catching runs over 1400m then struggled in heavy going in the Listed Wayne Wilson last start. Drops 5kgs and draws a far better gate today. Each-way at massive odds. WARBY (11) warmed nicely late behind WAR ETERNAL third-up and should be at his top now. Watch for him flashing again.
